evals.prompt: /discuss Should we migrate our PostgreSQL database to DynamoDB for our user service? We have about 50GB of data, mostly relational with some JSON columns. --mode converge --duration 5m
evals.expected_output: Intake asks 1-2 clarifying questions. Recruits 2 domain experts (database/migration). Discussion runs with facilitator-directed turns. Convergence reached via NGT voting. Output includes decision, rationale, dissent, confidence score.

evals.prompt: /discuss What are the implications of AI agents having persistent memory across conversations? Think about privacy, emergent behavior, and the relationship between human and AI. --duration 10m
evals.expected_output: Exploration mode (default). Recruits 2-3 experts (AI ethics, cognitive science, systems design). Discussion follows diverse threads. Facilitator allows tangents. Synthesis produces ideas map, key insights, open questions, surprising connections.

evals.prompt: /discuss How should we structure authentication for our microservices? --mode converge --size 0 --duration 5m
evals.expected_output: Core team only (--size 0, no domain experts). Intake may ask about current auth setup. Discussion is focused with 3 agents. Convergence with NGT voting among core team.

evals.prompt: /discuss What makes a great engineering culture? --duration 8m --models all-sonnet
evals.expected_output: Exploration mode. All-sonnet model assignment (experts on Sonnet, core team stays Opus per spec). Broad topic should recruit 2-3 diverse experts. Rich exploration with multiple threads.
